subcodes.title: Words to Marie Watson et al around Aug. 1921
subcodes.first_line: Retrogression is a possibility also through egotistic importance. Pride is the greatest sin - perhaps the only sin - leading to every other evil
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @education and the development of capacity, @scarcity of receptive souls, @contention and conflict, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
